verification.subject: Email Address Verification
verification.instruction: To complete your registration, please verify your email address.
verification.expiryInfo: This code is valid for 15 minutes.
verification.ignoreNote: If you did not create an account, please ignore this email.

passwordReset.subject: Password Reset
passwordReset.instruction: You have requested a password reset for your account.
passwordReset.expiryInfo: This code is valid for 15 minutes.
passwordReset.ignoreNote: If you did not request this, please ignore this email.

welcome.subject: Welcome!
welcome.message: Your account has been successfully created and verified.

invitation.subject: Team Invitation
invitation.message: You have been invited to join the team "{{teamName}}".

notifications.roleChanged: Your role has been changed to {{role}}
notifications.passwordChanged: Your password has been changed successfully
